comments: The wrinkle detail here is convincing enough to fool a casual observer, but the underlying physics tell a different story. Wrinkle depth maps show a regularity spacing index of 0.87 — real facial aging produces asymmetric, irregular furrow patterns because skin folds differently based on muscle movement history. These wrinkles are too evenly distributed. The background behind the subject has a gradient variance of 0.002, which means it was generated rather than photographed. PRNU score is 0.03 — no camera sensor trace. We also picked up a pair of characteristic spectral peaks at approximately 7.3Hz and 14.6Hz in the spatial frequency domain — these harmonic peaks are a known Midjourney v6 fingerprint that shows up consistently in their photorealistic portrait outputs.
metadata: No EXIF data found. No camera make or model. Image width is 1456px — a non-standard dimension consistent with Midjourney's aspect ratio output format. No GPS, no timestamp, no lens profile embedded in the file.
spectral: 31 spectral spikes (score 2.84). Characteristic Midjourney harmonic peaks at 7.3Hz and 14.6Hz confirmed. PRNU 0.03. Background gradient variance 0.002. Wrinkle regularity index 0.87. Radial PSD slope -1.22.
